case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. ARNOLD CARR ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585(D) (TRANSACTION ID # 66437069) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-30-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-18-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CARR, ARNOLD DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-28-2020
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200007150), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED FEB-11-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARR, ARNOLD

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-30-2021 CONTINUED TO MAY-18-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARR, ARNOLD $1,291.23 PRINCIPAL, $258.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,550.18, ***THERE IS A $600 CREDIT DEDUCTED FROM $1891.23 PRINCIPAL.*** SEE SCANNED DOC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $258.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $600.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 66437069) AS TO DEFENDANT CARR, ARNOLD
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66437069) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 66437069) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
